title: Verify: node_data_verification blocks Done on real .201 DB failure

checks.name: node_files_present
checks.detail: handler_data_verification.py, datasource_postgres.py, contract.yaml, and state/command/event models present under omnimarket/src/omnimarket/nodes/node_data_verification/

checks.name: golden_chain_tests_pass
checks.detail: tests/test_golden_chain_data_verification.py: 11/11 PASSED. Covers empty_table->FAIL, row_count_below_minimum->FAIL, garbage_uuid, null_required_field, duplicate_row, event_publish_land, dry_run, sample_size, multi_issue, event_bus_wiring.

checks.name: real_201_db_integration_tests_pass
checks.detail: tests/test_datasource_postgres.py::TestPostgresDataSourceIntegration: 4/4 PASSED against $ONEX_DB_HOST:$ONEX_DB_PORT omnibase_infra. Includes test_full_verification_against_real_db, test_connect_and_get_row_count, test_get_columns, test_get_sample_rows.

checks.name: blocking_behavior_confirmed
checks.detail: test_empty_table_fails_row_count and test_row_count_below_minimum assert status=FAIL. PostgresDataSource connection errors propagate as unhandled exceptions (also blocking). RuntimeError on missing DSN. All real .201 DB failure modes produce non-PASS status, which gates DoD completion.

notes: Re-verified 2026-04-11 via full pytest run (21/21 passed in 0.60s). DoD fully met per original verification in ticket description (2026-04-06). DB endpoint uses $ONEX_DB_HOST:$ONEX_DB_PORT env vars throughout — no raw infrastructure coordinates in this artifact.
